name: Aberrant Mind
description: An alien influence has awakened psionic sorcery within you.

1.name: Psionic Spells
1.description: You learn additional sorcerer spells tied to your aberrant origin.

1.name: Telepathic Speech
1.description: You can communicate telepathically with a creature you can see.

6.name: Psionic Sorcery
6.description: You can cast your psionic spells using sorcery points without verbal or somatic components.

14.name: Revelation in Flesh
14.description: You alter your body with aberrant traits, such as flight, swim speed, or seeing invisible creatures.

18.name: Warping Implosion
18.description: You teleport and pull nearby creatures inward with psychic force.
